claims.summary: FALLBACK_TEXTURE_RESTLESS_LATTICE_TERMS lacks opacity/resistance terms such as silted, obscured, viscous-drag, and submerged, making fallback language too clean/geometric for high-density felt states.
High-pressure mode_packing fallback should be tested so fallback output does not over-rely on generic gradient/distribute language when pressure risk and opacity evidence are present.
Gemma 4 12B versus gemma3:4b nuance under high-density fallback should remain transparent, but a live model A/B probe is runtime/provider-facing and not silently run as a heartbeat side effect.
